introSection: Pindsvinet is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. Pindsvinet is Danish for Hedgehog.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

fullText:
Pindsvinet is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. Pindsvinet is Danish for Hedgehog.

The ride has a single helix.
